message:
docs(robot,bd-g9981): backfill 20 missing subcommands in RobotTopic::Commands

Pre-fix: `cass robot-docs commands` (src/lib.rs:6893 RobotTopic::Commands)
hardcoded only 10 subcommands (search, stats, status, diag, sessions,
view, index, tui, capabilities, robot-docs) while `cass --help`
enumerated 31. Agents using robot-docs commands as the authoritative
CLI-surface enumeration — the documented pattern per README line
1017 — silently missed ~20 subcommands:

- Diagnostic JSON surfaces: health, doctor, introspect, api-version
- Model management: models status/install/remove/verify/check-update/backfill
- Static export: pages, export-html, export
- Session navigation: expand, resume, timeline, context
- Remote sync: sources (agents list/exclude/include, setup/list/sync)
- Analytics: analytics (status/tokens/tools/models/rebuild/validate)
- Other: import, daemon, completions, man, state (alias of status)

An agent discovering cass via robot-docs commands could not find the
truth surfaces for health/doctor/models and had no way to know
expand/resume/timeline existed.

Fix: extend RobotTopic::Commands with one line per missing subcommand
(name + primary flags + 1-line summary). Keeps the existing
search/index expansions and the --robot-help / robot-docs pointer.
tests/golden/robot_docs/commands.txt.golden regenerated to pin the
new enumeration; tests/golden/robot_docs/schemas.txt.golden regenerated
to reflect the 4 new response_schemas (doctor, models-status,
models-verify, models-check-update) that landed via 0h4cx earlier
this session.

Validation: 12/12 golden_robot_docs tests pass; cargo fmt --check clean.

Closes coding_agent_session_search-g9981.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -6932,6 +6932,34 @@ fn print_robot_docs(topic: RobotTopic, wrap: WrapConfig) -> CliResult<()> {
             "  cass capabilities [--json]".to_string(),
             "  cass robot-docs <topic>".to_string(),
             "  cass --robot-help".to_string(),
+            // coding_agent_session_search-g9981: backfill the 20 subcommands
+            // this list omitted pre-fix. Agents using `cass robot-docs
+            // commands` as the authoritative CLI enumeration now see the
+            // full advertised surface instead of the ~10-command slice.
+            "  cass health [--json]             Minimal readiness probe (<50ms, exit 0=healthy, 1=unhealthy).".to_string(),
+            "  cass doctor [--json] [--fix]     Diagnostic checks + optional safe auto-fix (derivatives only).".to_string(),
+            "  cass introspect [--json]         Full API schema: commands, arguments, response_schemas (alphabetical).".to_string(),
+            "  cass api-version [--json]        Show crate_version + api_version + contract_version.".to_string(),
+            "  cass state [--json]              Alias of `cass status` (index/db/rebuild/semantic readiness).".to_string(),
+            "  cass models status [--json]      Semantic model acquisition + cache state.".to_string(),
+            "  cass models install [--from-file DIR] [--model NAME]  Download + install embedder (minilm | snowflake-arctic-s | nomic-embed).".to_string(),
+            "  cass models remove [--model NAME]  Remove an installed semantic model from disk.".to_string(),
+            "  cass models verify [--json]      Per-file SHA-256 verification of the installed model.".to_string(),
+            "  cass models check-update [--json]  Compare installed revision against the pinned registry revision.".to_string(),
+            "  cass models backfill             Re-embed conversations against a newly acquired model.".to_string(),
+            "  cass expand <path> --line N [-C CONTEXT] [--json]  Show messages around a specific line in a session.".to_string(),
+            "  cass resume <path> [--shell]     Resolve a session path into its native-harness resume command.".to_string(),
+            "  cass timeline [--since DATE] [--until DATE] [--json]  Activity timeline over a time range.".to_string(),
+            "  cass context <path> [--json]     Find related sessions for a given source path.".to_string(),
+            "  cass export <path> [--format markdown] [--output FILE]  Export a conversation to markdown / other formats.".to_string(),
+            "  cass export-html <path> [--output-dir DIR] [--json]  Self-contained HTML export (optional encryption).".to_string(),
+            "  cass pages [--export-only DIR] [--verify PATH] [--agents A1,A2]  Encrypted searchable archive for static hosting.".to_string(),
+            "  cass sources [agents list|exclude|include] [setup|list|sync] [--json]  Manage remote sources + agent exclusions.".to_string(),
+            "  cass analytics [status|tokens|tools|models|rebuild|validate] [--json]  Token / tool / model analytics.".to_string(),
+            "  cass import [...]                Import conversation data from external sources.".to_string(),
+            "  cass daemon [...]                Run the semantic model daemon (Unix only).".to_string(),
+            "  cass completions <shell>         Emit shell completion script for bash | zsh | fish | powershell.".to_string(),
+            "  cass man                         Emit man page (roff) for the cass binary.".to_string(),
         ],
         RobotTopic::Env => vec![
             "env:".to_string(),

@@ -38,3 +38,27 @@ commands:
   cass capabilities [--json]
   cass robot-docs <topic>
   cass --robot-help
+  cass health [--json]             Minimal readiness probe (<50ms, exit 0=healthy, 1=unhealthy).
+  cass doctor [--json] [--fix]     Diagnostic checks + optional safe auto-fix (derivatives only).
+  cass introspect [--json]         Full API schema: commands, arguments, response_schemas (alphabetical).
+  cass api-version [--json]        Show crate_version + api_version + contract_version.
+  cass state [--json]              Alias of `cass status` (index/db/rebuild/semantic readiness).
+  cass models status [--json]      Semantic model acquisition + cache state.
+  cass models install [--from-file DIR] [--model NAME]  Download + install embedder (minilm | snowflake-arctic-s | nomic-embed).
+  cass models remove [--model NAME]  Remove an installed semantic model from disk.
+  cass models verify [--json]      Per-file SHA-256 verification of the installed model.
+  cass models check-update [--json]  Compare installed revision against the pinned registry revision.
+  cass models backfill             Re-embed conversations against a newly acquired model.
+  cass expand <path> --line N [-C CONTEXT] [--json]  Show messages around a specific line in a session.
+  cass resume <path> [--shell]     Resolve a session path into its native-harness resume command.
+  cass timeline [--since DATE] [--until DATE] [--json]  Activity timeline over a time range.
+  cass context <path> [--json]     Find related sessions for a given source path.
+  cass export <path> [--format markdown] [--output FILE]  Export a conversation to markdown / other formats.
+  cass export-html <path> [--output-dir DIR] [--json]  Self-contained HTML export (optional encryption).
+  cass pages [--export-only DIR] [--verify PATH] [--agents A1,A2]  Encrypted searchable archive for static hosting.
+  cass sources [agents list|exclude|include] [setup|list|sync] [--json]  Manage remote sources + agent exclusions.
+  cass analytics [status|tokens|tools|models|rebuild|validate] [--json]  Token / tool / model analytics.
+  cass import [...]                Import conversation data from external sources.
+  cass daemon [...]                Run the semantic model daemon (Unix only).
+  cass completions <shell>         Emit shell completion script for bash | zsh | fish | powershell.
+  cass man                         Emit man page (roff) for the cass binary.

       - arch: string

       - conversations: ?

     - response_schemas: object

   search:
     - _meta: object
       - ann_stats: ?
